mapper.select: -- 사업본부 코드로 활성 부서를 조회한다. SELECT d.department_id FROM departments d WHERE d.code = #{departmentCode} AND d.is_active = TRUE
-- 확률 기준으로 전사 공통 활성 수주확률 단계를 조회한다. SELECT ps.probability_stage_id, ps.probability, ps.name FROM probability_stages ps WHERE ps.probability = #{probability} AND ps.is_active = TRUE
-- 전사 공통 활성 수주확률 단계 목록을 조회한다. SELECT ps.probability_stage_id, ps.probability, ps.name FROM probability_stages ps WHERE ps.is_active = TRUE ORDER BY ps.display_order, ps.probability
mapper.insert: -- 신규 영업 사이트를 등록한다. INSERT INTO opportunities ( department_id, customer_name, project_name, owner_name, owner_employee_id, security_level, expected_order_period, expected_delivery_period, project_amount, probability_stage_id, status, created_by, updated_by ) VALUES ( #{departmentId}, #{customerName}, #{projectName}, #{ownerName}, #{ownerEmployeeId}, #{securityLevel}, #{expectedOrderPeriod}, #{expectedDeliveryPeriod}, #{projectAmount}, #{probabilityStageId}, #{status}, #{createdBy}, #{createdBy} )

-- 보안 프로젝트 열람 허용 사용자를 등록한다. INSERT INTO opportunity_view_permissions ( opportunity_id, user_id, created_by ) VALUES ( #{opportunityId}, #{userId}, #{createdBy} ) ON CONFLICT (opportunity_id, user_id) DO NOTHING

-- 영업 사이트 진행 기록을 생성한다. INSERT INTO opportunity_progress ( opportunity_id, progress_date, probability_stage_id, content, created_by ) VALUES ( #{opportunityId}, #{progressDate}, #{probabilityStageId}, #{content}, #{createdBy} )
-- 임원 코멘트를 영업 사이트에 등록한다. INSERT INTO opportunity_executive_comments ( opportunity_id, content, created_by ) VALUES ( #{opportunityId}, #{content}, #{createdBy} )
mapper.update: -- 최신 영업 진행 기록의 수주확률 단계를 영업 사이트 현재 단계에 반영한다. UPDATE opportunities SET probability_stage_id = #{probabilityStageId}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE opportunity_id = #{opportunityId}
mapper.select: -- 권한 범위 안에서 영업 사이트 상세 정보를 조회한다. SELECT o.opportunity_id, d.department_id, d.code AS department_code, d.name AS department_name, o.customer_name, o.project_name, o.owner_name, o.security_level, o.expected_order_period, o.expected_delivery_period, o.project_amount, o.status, ps.probability, ps.name AS probability_stage_name FROM opportunities o INNER JOIN departments d ON d.department_id = o.department_id INNER JOIN probability_stages ps ON ps.probability_stage_id = o.probability_stage_id WHERE o.opportunity_id = #{opportunityId}

-- 영업 사이트 일자별 진행 기록을 조회한다. SELECT op.opportunity_progress_id, op.progress_date, ps.probability, ps.name AS probability_stage_name, op.content FROM opportunity_progress op INNER JOIN probability_stages ps ON ps.probability_stage_id = op.probability_stage_id WHERE op.opportunity_id = #{opportunityId} ORDER BY op.progress_date DESC, op.opportunity_progress_id DESC

-- 영업 사이트에 등록된 임원 코멘트 목록을 조회한다. SELECT oec.opportunity_executive_comment_id, oec.opportunity_id, oec.content, oec.created_by, u.name AS created_by_name, oec.created_at FROM opportunity_executive_comments oec LEFT JOIN users u ON u.user_id = oec.created_by WHERE oec.opportunity_id = #{opportunityId} ORDER BY oec.created_at DESC, oec.opportunity_executive_comment_id DESC
